name: YFY Inc.
summary: YFY Inc. manufactures and sells papers in Taiwan, Mainland China, and internationally. The company offers pulp, premium, Kraft, corrugated, and fine papers; cardboards, paper and pulp products, cardboard and colored cases and boxes, and food containers; napkins, tissue papers, and detergent; and styrene butadiene latex. It provides corrugated boxes and paper pallets; and commercial photography, brand packaging design, certification testing, and printing management services. The company offers color, art, and security printing services; paper, chemical, machinery, business paper, and material trading services; RFID technology solutions; production technologies for PCBS; and smart cards and application systems, information security products, and consumer service solutions. It provides banking, securities, investment trust, customer service technology, rental companies, insurance, and venture investment services. The company offers pharmaceutical and stem cell products; investment, management, and consultancy services for biotechnology companies; researches and develops pharmaceutical products and clinical applications, and internationally licenses medical devices; rare cell diagnostics technology and genetic testing; and information software services. It develops mobile applications and ePaper; operates an online store, Yuen Foong Shop, and restaurants; organic food, chemical, and electronic products; agricultural resource recycling; graphic and brand design services; wholesales agriculture products and building materials; and factoring and seedling cultivation businesses. The company offers active carbons and fertilizers; refractory materials, cement, and concrete products; environmental protection equipment; designs and prints magazines, posters, books, and advertisements; operates cogeneration facility; and constructs water processing, environmental, sewage treatment, and incinerator facilities. YFY Inc. was founded in 1924 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.
